scripts.verify:full: npm run lint && npm run test:e2e
scripts.verify:full:ci: npm run lint && npm run test:e2e:ci
scripts.test:e2e: playwright test tests/player-basics.spec.js tests/player-real-media.spec.js tests/player-restore-waveform.spec.js tests/player-keyboard-playnow.spec.js --project=chromium --project=firefox
scripts.test:e2e:ci: playwright test tests/player-basics.spec.js tests/player-real-media.spec.js tests/player-restore-waveform.spec.js tests/player-keyboard-playnow.spec.js
